rationale: The raw evidence is only a DOI match (reference index 2) without an in-text citation snippet, so direct usage is not explicit. However, the cited paper’s focus on customer-level multichannel behavior, marketing-contact effects (catalog/e-mail), and heterogeneous Bayesian dynamic modeling strongly overlaps with the citing paper’s customer-level multichannel microtargeting setting and modeling approach, making substantive methodological/mechanism use plausible rather than clearly incidental.
